# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting:
👉 [Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/ctwoodwa/Sunfish/security/advisories/new)

We follow coordinated disclosure — fixes ship before public disclosure.
Expected response: within 7 days.

## Supported Versions

Sunfish is in active pre-1.0 development. Security fixes are applied to the
latest commit on `main` only. No backport policy exists until a stable release
is tagged.

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| `main` (pre-release) | ✅ |
| Any tagged release | Assessed case-by-case |
